source: Sinus Institut, Heidelberg. https://www.sinus-institut.de/sinus-milieus — Commercial segmentation model, widely used in German-speaking markets. Descriptions here are derived from publicly available summaries and academic references. For full model access: https://www.sinus-institut.de
note: Sinus-Milieus segment audiences by values and lifestyle, not just demographics. For brand/image analysis, they indicate which visual language resonates with which audience. This subset focuses on milieus relevant for lifestyle/consumer product brands.
usage: Select max 2 values that best describe the target audience implied by this brand content. Look for lifestyle signals, values language, and aspiration markers in the text.

upper_liberal.description: Educated, culturally engaged, values quality over quantity, critical of ostentation. Responds to authenticity, craftsmanship, ethical production.
upper_liberal.visual_signals: Clean editorial photography, natural materials, understated luxury, long-form storytelling

performer.description: High-achieving, efficiency-oriented, globally mobile, technology-affine. Values premium performance and status without loudness.
performer.visual_signals: Dynamic compositions, urban settings, premium minimalism, people in motion

expeditive.description: Young, creative, networked, rejects mainstream. Values individuality, authenticity, new experiences over status symbols.
expeditive.visual_signals: Raw textures, unconventional angles, diverse casting, anti-stock-photo aesthetic

adaptive_pragmatic.description: Practical, solution-oriented young mainstream. Values functionality and good design at fair price. Less aspirational, more grounded.
adaptive_pragmatic.visual_signals: Relatable settings, natural light, everyday contexts, diverse but approachable casting

socioecological.description: Sustainability-driven, critical of consumerism, values fairness and responsibility. Responds to transparency, impact, community.
socioecological.visual_signals: Natural settings, process/behind-the-scenes imagery, earthy palette, collaborative scenes

traditional.description: Security-oriented, conventional, values reliability and proven quality over novelty.
traditional.visual_signals: Warm domestic settings, family contexts, classic product shots, reassuring compositions

unspecified.description: Audience cannot be clearly determined from text alone

for_image_generation: Each milieu's visual_signals field maps directly to casting, setting, and composition decisions in image generation prompts
